## What feature are you requesting?
<!-- Describe the new functionality or field clearly -->

## Which part of the project does this affect?
<!-- Pipeline / Standards / Template / Documentation / Other -->

## What problem does it solve?
<!-- Why is this feature needed? What is currently missing or difficult? -->

## Proposed solution
<!-- If you have an idea of how it could be implemented, describe it here -->

## Alternatives considered
<!-- Have you considered other ways to solve this problem? -->

## Additional context
<!-- Any references, examples from other tools, or mockups -->
